SEARCH

Uses of Enum Class
notification.NotificationType

Packages that use NotificationType
Package
Description
notification
This package contains everything related to the notifications of the store.
user
It contains everything related to the different users of the store.

    Method
    Description

    Obtains the type of notification

    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    Notification(String title, String text, LocalDateTime timeReceived, boolean read, boolean visible, NotificationType type)
    Creates a new notification with default timeMade (this moment)
     
    Notification(String assignedTitle, String assignedText, LocalDateTime timeMade, LocalDateTime assignedTimeReceived, boolean assignedRead, boolean assignedVisible, NotificationType assignedType)
    Creates a new notification
     
    Notification(LocalDateTime timeReceived, boolean read, boolean visible, NotificationType type)
    Creates a new notification with default timeMade (this moment) and no content

    Creates a new exchange notification

    Creates a new exchange notification without title and text
